description_long: This handbag features a rounded, soft body with a prominent flap closure on the front, secured by a metallic clasp. The exterior is adorned with a bold, geometric mandala-inspired pattern in shades of navy blue, pale pink, and yellow, giving it a vibrant and artistic appearance. The bag has a single, short strap attached to one side with a metallic ring, suitable for carrying by hand or on the wrist. The surface appears to be made of fabric or faux leather, with a slightly matte finish and a semi-soft tactile quality. The overall construction suggests a lightweight, flexible structure, likely lined with fabric on the inside. No visible brand logo or additional decorative hardware is present, keeping the design focused on the striking pattern.
description: A rounded handbag with a flap closure, featuring a bold geometric mandala pattern in navy, pink, and yellow, and a single short strap.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flap closure with metallic clasp and the full mandala pattern.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim profile and the attachment of the short strap.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the continuation of the geometric pattern and the rounded shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the thinness and the strap's attachment point.
attribute_strap_type: Single short handle strap, non-adjustable, attached to one side with a metal ring.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Flap closure with a central metallic clasp located on the front.
attribute_pattern: Geometric mandala-inspired pattern in navy blue, pale pink, yellow, and white.
